title: nyctophylax alba
intro: Nyctophylax alba is a type of plant that belongs to the family Annonaceae, commonly known as the custard apple or soursop. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Nyctophylax alba include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce symptoms of anxiety and depression. Nyctophylax alba can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of ailments.
